# webViewDidEndEditing(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sent by the default notification center when the user stops editing the web view.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func webViewDidEndEditing(_ notification: Notification!)
```

## Parameters

- **notification**: Always set to [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebViewDidEndEditingNotification]. You can retrieve the `WebView` object by sending `object` to `notification`.

## Related Documentation

- **webView(_:shouldEndEditingIn:)**: Returns whether the user should be allowed to end editing.
- **webViewDidBeginEditing(_:)**: Sent by the default notification center when the user begins editing the web view.
